title: Your Daily Check-In
subtitle: A gentle two minutes for you.

steps.title: Take three calm, deep breaths
steps.prompt: Follow the circle. Breathe in as it grows, and out as it softens.

steps.title: How are you feeling right now?
steps.prompt: No judgement. Just notice what's here — a word, a sentence, a feeling.

steps.title: What's one thing you're grateful for today?
steps.prompt: However small. A warm drink, someone's smile, a quiet moment on the way to work.

steps.title: One small intention to brighten today?
steps.prompt: A tiny action — a walk, a kind message, a deep breath before your next meeting.

completion.title: Beautifully done.
completion.body: That's your check-in for today. Small actions, happier days — see you tomorrow.
